overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City at night. The character navigates from an upper plaza down to street level, walks along neon-lit sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and continues through flooded streets with heavy neon signage and holographic billboards illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza with food vendors and yellow barriers

events.description: rain intensifies into a heavy downpour with visible sheets of rain
descending stairs from upper plaza down to street level

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza past illuminated food carts and descending stairs to street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red umbrella walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: street food vendor cart with illuminated menu display and colorful umbrella
low yellow walls dividing plaza sections and providing seating
tall futuristic skyscraper with glass facade and cyan neon accents
urban tree with green foliage in planter
large red neon advertisement sign on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an elevated urban plaza during a rainy night, featuring glowing food carts and yellow concrete barriers. The character walks through the plaza as rain intensifies, passing a pedestrian with a red umbrella, then descends stairs toward street level while neon-lit skyscrapers loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked city sidewalk with neon storefronts and holographic ads

events.description: turning right to follow sidewalk along the main street
navigating through crowd of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking along wet sidewalk passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red glowing umbrella walking ahead in same direction
pedestrian in bright yellow jacket passing by in opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow textured paving stones for visually impaired pedestrians
metal railing separating sidewalk from street level
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated graphics
building exterior with red paneling and vertical neon light strips

segments.scene_description: Having reached street level, the character walks along a rain-soaked sidewalk lined with metal railings and holographic billboards. The scene features moderate pedestrian traffic with people carrying glowing umbrellas, while neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. The character navigates through the crowd while passing distinctive red building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with heavy neon signage and crosswalks

events.description: stepping off sidewalk onto crosswalk entering large intersection
waiting for vehicles to pass while crossing the wide intersection
turning left while crossing to navigate around groups of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing wide intersection through heavy rain while avoiding vehicles and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white painted crosswalk lines on wet asphalt
orange neon sign for PRIMA store glowing brightly
massive building-sized holographic advertisement with animated figures
tall pole with illuminated traffic signals and walk signs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large urban intersection, leaving the sidewalk for the crosswalk. Massive holographic billboards and neon signs illuminate the area from all sides while vehicles drive through the crossing. The character navigates through groups of pedestrians crossing in the same direction, with the orange PRIMA store sign visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded street section with deep water and neon reflections

events.description: entering deeply flooded street section with water covering the entire ground surface
slowing down while navigating through deep water covering the street

agents.ego_description: walking through flooded street with water reaching ankles, neon lights reflecting on the water surface

entered.detail: street covered in deep water with ripples and neon reflections
store entrance with bright orange PRIMA signage and illuminated windows
palm tree trunk wrapped with purple and cyan neon lighting
metal barrel and urban debris floating in flood water

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character enters a flooded street section where water covers the entire ground. The PRIMA storefront with its bright orange neon sign dominates the right side, while the character wades through ankle-deep water that reflects the surrounding neon lights. The scene ends as the character approaches a dark alley entrance with debris floating in the flooded street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated urban plaza down into the flooded, neon-drenched depths of a rainy city street. It begins amidst glowing food carts and yellow concrete barriers, following the character as they pass a red umbrella and descend a set of stairs toward the city floor. As the camera reaches street level, the environment shifts to a rain-soaked sidewalk where holographic billboards and red building facades reflect off the wet pavement. The scene then expands into a massive urban intersection, moving through crowds of pedestrians and passing under towering neon signs before crossing toward a bright orange PRIMA storefront. Finally, the camera glides into a flooded street section where the character wades through ankle-deep water reflecting the city lights, ending as they approach a dark, debris-filled alley.
